gist.headline: PromptPilot takes flight
gist.blurb: PromptPilot just landed in the community showcase. It's a Telegram bot that wires up 20 of our models—from Flux to ElevenLabs—so you can generate images, video, and audio without leaving your chat.
gist.summary: Added PromptPilot Bot to the community showcase, integrating 20 different image, video, and audio generation models via the Pollinations API.
gist.impact: The community gets a new way to interact with the API directly from Telegram, supporting everything from Imagen 4 to Seedance.
gist.visual_concept: A pilot/aviation theme to match 'PromptPilot'. The Pollinations bee (Polly) wearing tiny aviator goggles, flying alongside a cute robot dressed as a pilot or a paper airplane (Telegram logo reference). They are navigating through floating polaroids, film strips, and musical notes to represent the multi-modal capabilities.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny aviator goggles, flying alongside a chunky pixel robot dressed as a pilot. They are soaring through a sky filled with floating polaroids, film strips, and musical notes. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel blue gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like A Short Hike. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
